creator: titi5187@gmail.com
text:
When VIMAGE is active in a kernel and if we use packet filter, we can have a core dump. 

When I just run my freebsd machine with vimage and pf, it's ok. After when I connect to SSH of the BSD machine, the problems come and there is a core dump.


The options activ in the kernel are : 

                 - options  VIMAGE
                 - device   pf
                 - device   pflog

FreeBSD XXXX 2 10.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #10: Thu May 23 16:38:06 CEST 2013     XXXX@XXXXX:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MONNOYAU  amd64
